# Deprecated Methods Reference

Methods that still work but should be replaced with their modern equivalents.
These are defined in `seeds/seed.manual.toml` under `[builders.*.deprecated_aliases]`.

| Deprecated method | Use instead | Underlying field | Builder |
|---|---|---|---|
| `.delegate()` | `.agent_tool()` | `_delegate` | Agent |
| `.guardrail()` | `.guard()` | `_guardrail` | Agent |
| `.history()` | `.context()` | `include_contents` | Agent |
| `.include_history()` | `.context()` | `include_contents` | Agent |
| `.inject_context()` | `.prepend()` | `_inject_context` | Agent |
| `.input_schema()` | `.accepts()` | `input_schema` | Agent |
| `.output_key()` | `.writes()` | `output_key` | Agent |
| `.output_schema()` | `.returns()` | `output_schema` | Agent |
| `.outputs()` | `.writes()` | `output_key` | Agent |
| `.retry_if()` | `.loop_while()` | `_retry_if` | Agent |
| `.save_as()` | `.writes()` | `output_key` | Agent |
| `.static_instruct()` | `.static()` | `static_instruction` | Agent |

## Quick grep patterns

To find deprecated usage in code, search for these patterns:
```
.delegate(
.guardrail(
.history(
.include_history(
.inject_context(
.input_schema(
.output_key(
.output_schema(
.outputs(
.retry_if(
.save_as(
.static_instruct(
```
